name: Cheddar Beer Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup finely grated sharp cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
CRUST: Preheat the oven to 500 degrees. Prepare the crust by mixing the flour, sugar, and lemon rind in a bowl. Add the softened butter and mix until the mixture resembles breadcrumbs. Stir in the egg yolk and vanilla until combined. Press about one-third of this dough into the bottom of an 8-inch springform pan. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Be careful, as it can burn quickly. Let cool completely.
FILLING: In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth and light. Gradually add the grated cheddar cheese, mixing well after each addition. Stir in the sugar, vanilla, orange zest, and lemon zest. Beat in the eggs and egg yolks one at a time, ensuring each is fully incorporated. Mix in the beer and heavy cream until just combined. Pour the filling into the prepared crust.
Return to the 500-degree oven and bake for an additional 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly browned on top. Reduce the temperature to 250 degrees. Bake for 1 to 1-1/2 hours, or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean but slightly set. Allow cooling to room temperature before serving.
